title: Diamondback stock should get a boost as M&A overhang lifted after $1.6 billion FireBird Energy deal
text: Shares of Diamondback Energy Inc. FANG, -0.67% rose 0.7% in premarket trading Wednesday, after the oil and natural gas company announced an agreement to buy all leasehold interest and related assets of FireBird Energy LLC for about $1.59 billion in cash and stock. Under terms of the deal announced late Tuesday, Diamondback will exchange 5.86 million of its common stock, which closed Tuesday at $139.37, and $775 million in cash for the Midland Basin assets.
